name: SAM Intro — NASAMS Battery
description: One NASAMS-class SAM battery (modeled visually as a MIM-104 Patriot launcher) sits 30 km ahead. ~25 km engagement range, 8-missile magazine, 2-missile ripple-fire salvos, drops to single-shot on last 2 rounds. Radar 75 km. Player is on their own — no friendly support, no hostile fighters. Intent: feel the missile-launch RWR warning, evade, and (optionally) SEAD the site.
